description: Primary database technologies for Architect Console dropdowns. Loaded on first boot when scope=GLOBAL is empty for this category.

entries.name: PostgreSQL
entries.description: Open-source relational DB; JSONB, advanced indexing, CTEs.

entries.name: MySQL
entries.description: Relational DB; widely available, strong ecosystem.

entries.name: SQLite
entries.description: Embedded single-file DB; ideal for prototypes and single-node apps.
